title: Pgl Yoyo
description:
Peter Lowe (PGL / yoyo.org) maintains curated blocklists of ad-serving, tracking, and malicious domains and IP addresses. This connector imports PGL blocklists into OpenCTI and transforms entries into STIX 2.1 Indicators for IPv4 addresses and domain names.

Key features:
• Parses plain-text feeds and emits canonical STIX 2.1 Indicator patterns
• Supports both IPv4 and Domain-Name indicator types
• Input sanitization and validation before emission
• Configurable multiple feeds with custom labels
• Scheduled imports with configurable interval
short_description: PGL Yoyo connector imports Peter Lowe's ad/tracking blocklists into OpenCTI as STIX 2.1 Indicators for IPv4 addresses and domain names.
